metadata.description:
Collection of tamagotchi smart firmware.

Fanmade English Firmware:
TMGC_Smart_FW_RAW_[ENG]
TMGC_Smart_FW_SmacardVer_[ENG] (Edited to be applied via a custom-built Smacard)

Original Japanese Firmware:
TMGC_Niziu_Smart_FW_[JP]
TMGC_Mint_Smart_FW_[JP]
metadata.subject: tamagotchi
metadata.title: Tamagotchi Smart Firmware [ Eng+JP]
metadata.subject: tamagotchi smart
